stemHtml: Which of these statements is correct about a flight crew oxygen mask?

options.a: When selected to the position “EMERGENCY” oxygen is supplied with some overpressure above a certain altitude.
options.b: In the position “DILUTE” oxygen supply is from a special bottle containing diluted oxygen.
options.c: Below a certain altitude the oxygen mask switches automatically to “constant flow”.
options.d: Above a certain altitude oxygen is always delivered at a slight overpressure independent of selected mask position.
